text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a day out with Narita Brian, we decide to
have dinner together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'm fine with just some fast food.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't take long, and we can get takeout.
Sounds good, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't Brian!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What are you doin' here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: We're just about to get some fast food.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Fast food? You don't mean for dinner, do ya?
Unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And you! You're supposed to be a trainer! It's
your job to manage her diet, ya know?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, right! I just thought of somethin'! Come with
me a sec!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: H-hey!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: All right, tell me what you wanna eat tonight!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What the heck is this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Listen, Brian. You gotta eat somethin' at least a
bit healthier than fast food.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Even at the academy, you only eat bread or
sandwiches for lunch. You don't use the cafeteria
much, right?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's too many people at the cafeteria. It's too
much trouble. I just want to eat alone in peace.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Maybe so, but just eating bread isn't a balanced
diet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Go to the cafeteria. They'll serve ya a balanced
meal without you even havin' to think about it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I don't care what I eat, as long as it fills my
stomach.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well you should! C'mon, isn't there any kind of
food you like?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Can't you just let it go?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Why do you care so much about what I eat? It has
nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nothing to do with me?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Right, well, I don't really care about the logic at
this point! I'm sayin' this because I'm worried
about you!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I don't want my rival taken off the track for
somethin' that's not even to do with racing!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So... ya gotta stay healthy. Otherwise it affects
me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Anyway... I get what you're trying to say.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll stop eating fast food. Satisfied?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: If ya really understand... then okay. Sure.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right, well, I might as well make ya some
dinner! Got anythin' you wanna eat?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Anything's fine.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
That's the hardest answer to work with... C'mon,
there's gotta be something!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You decide. You're my trainer, after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Okay, that then.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Somethin' well-balanced it is! Leave it to
Hishiama! I'll whip ya up somethin' perfect!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Just you wait!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...I'll keep my expectations within reason.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her about it a few days later, and she says
Hishi Amazon's cooking was delicious.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah, might as well. That'd probably be good.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Stamina, eh? All right, leave it to Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna cook you up something nice and
hearty!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: With a lot of meat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! I thought ya'd say that! All right, leave it
to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I ask her about the meal a few days later. She tells
me that, while it wasn't as hearty as she'd hoped,
it was still very tasty.
